key.description: The key of the field. This is the value to send as input.

refresh_requirements_on_change.description: Indicates that any changes in this field affect the requirements, if this field is changed, the requirements endpoint must be called again to recheck if there are any additional requirements.

required.description: Whether or not the field is required.

display_format.description: Formatting mask to guide user input.

example.description: An example value for this field.

min_length.description: The minimum length of the field's value.

max_length.description: The maximum length of the field's value.

validation_regexp.description: A regular expression which may be used to validate the user input.

validation_async.description: Details of an endpoint which may be used to validate the user input.

values_allowed.description: Shows which values are allowed for fields of type "select" or "radio".
